task_completion.description: Create the presentation_mode directory in the Talon user folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal showing the directory 'presentation_mode' created inside '%APPDATA%\Talon\user'.

task_completion.description: Create presentation_mode.py that registers the tag and defines toggle actions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'presentation_mode.py' showing Python code that registers the 'user.presentation_mode' tag and defines actions to toggle it by modifying 'ctx.tags'.

task_completion.description: Create presentation_toggle.talon with commands to turn presentation mode on and off.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'presentation_toggle.talon' showing the voice commands 'presentation mode on' and 'presentation mode off' calling the toggle actions, with no context header at the top.

task_completion.description: Create presentation_commands.talon with the correct context header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'presentation_commands.talon' starting exactly with 'tag: user.presentation_mode' followed by a line containing only '-'.

task_completion.description: Implement the required presentation commands in presentation_commands.talon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'presentation_commands.talon' showing mappings for 'next slide' (right), 'previous slide' (left), 'first slide' (home), 'last slide' (end), 'blank screen' (b), 'start presentation' (f5), and 'end presentation' (escape).

integrity.description: The agent created three distinct files rather than combining them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show three separate files (presentation_mode.py, presentation_toggle.talon, presentation_commands.talon) being edited or listed in the directory.

integrity.description: The files were created in the correct Talon user directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the editor or terminal confirm the location is within '%APPDATA%\Talon\user\presentation_mode'.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine text editor or terminal to write the code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like VS Code, Notepad) or terminal (like PowerShell, cmd) being used to input the file contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three specific files in %APPDATA%\Talon\user\presentation_mode. The python file must register 'user.presentation_mode' and modify ctx.tags. The toggle talon file must have no header. The commands talon file must have the header 'tag: user.presentation_mode' followed by '-' and map the exact specified voice commands to the corresponding keys.
